reviews.review_title: Get stuck right from the beginning
reviews.review_description: Stuck can’t do anything I paid for this and it doesn’t work,should of read the reviews I would like a refund

developer_response.body: I don't know what you mean by stuck it works fine on both quest 2 and 3 for me and has for years

reviews.review_description: Guys, all great. This is exactly what I was looking for, just pure archery with targets and multiplayer and regular bow models without any futurism👍. It just requires graphics boost as currently it too basic, MQ2 can maintain much better graphics. And obviously need more maps for single player. Thank you!

I really like the controls,i can even pull the string to my cheek and doesnt seem to lose tracking like in other archery games but theres not much content when playing on my own.there needs to be more single player challenges and options,even bots for the arena mode especially as i cant find anyone online.this could be great with some updates

I had used Backyard Archery for some time and found it an enjoyable app. However it has Not been functional for some months. It does Not function on Quest Pro or Quest 3 in my experience. Both headsets use basically the same operating system of 'Meta Horizon' I think it is called.

developer_response.body:
Tested Works perfectly fine on Quest 2 and 3 headsets 

Quest Pro issues are due to a buggy meta update contact Meta

reviews.review_description: This seems great and I really want to play it, but it just doesn't seem to work. The bow doesn't draw in any of the actual game modes. Really hope it gets fixed

developer_response.body:
Tested Works perfectly fine on Quest 2 and 3 headsets 

Quest Pro issues are due to a buggy meta update contact Meta
